result:
All code changes are complete. The test commands require bash approval to execute. Here are the verification commands to run:

```bash
# 1. Field deconstruction tests
python -m django test \
  tests.field_decomposition.tests.FieldDeconstructionTests.test_file_path_field \
  tests.field_decomposition.tests.FieldDeconstructionTests.test_file_path_field_callable \
  tests.field_decomposition.tests.FieldDeconstructionTests.test_file_path_field_functools_partial \
  --settings=tests.settings_sqlite

# 2. Migration writer test
python -m django test \
  tests.migrations.test_writer.WriterTests.test_serialize_file_path_field_callable \
  --settings=tests.settings_sqlite

# 3. Autodetector tests
python -m django test \
  tests.migrations.test_autodetector.AutodetectorTests.test_file_path_field_callable_path_no_migration \
  tests.migrations.test_autodetector.AutodetectorTests.test_file_path_field_functools_partial_path \
  --settings=tests.settings_sqlite

# 4. Runtime formfield test
python -m django test \
  tests.model_fields.test_promises.PromiseTest.test_FilePathField_callable_path_formfield \
  --settings=tests.settings_sqlite
```

## Summary of Changes (5 files, +88/-1 lines)

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `django/db/models/fields/__init__.py` | `formfield()` resolves callable `self.path` before passing to forms layer |
| `tests/field_decomposition/tests.py` | Added callable + partial deconstruction tests |
| `tests/migrations/test_writer.py` | Added serialization round-trip test for callable path |
| `tests/migrations/test_autodetector.py` | Added no-migration and AlterField tests for callable/partial paths |
| `tests/model_fields/test_promises.py` | Added formfield runtime resolution test |
